creator: jlmales@gmail.com
text:
During the short use of XFCE DE after a "pkg upgrade" of 12 October 2019 14:58+000 UTC the XFCE DE can shrink such that there are vertical margins of black that occur on both sides of the XFCE DE.

FreeBSD 11.3 and XFCE were installed mid July 2019 with no problems nor issues in use of XFCE DE until the "pkg upgrade" of 12 October 2019 14:58+000 UTC.  The last "pkg upgrade" done was 02 October 2019 0326+000 UTC and presented no issue with the XFCE DE as had been case and expected since the install of Mid July 2019.
